hook.summary: A sniper scope view of a hostage situation where the shot misses and hits the hostage.
hook.visual_action: Sniper scope zooms in on a terrorist holding a woman hostage; the shot is fired and hits the woman.

scene_flow: Sniper scope view of a hostage situation at an airport; the shot misses and hits the hostage.
Close-up of the sniper rifle firing a bullet in slow motion.
Wide shot of the airport tarmac showing the failed mission and an explosion.
Sniper character looks disappointed as 'FAILED' text appears.
Final scene shows the game title 'SNIPER 3D' with a 'PLAY' button and a new mission scene.
audience_proxy: Men 18-35 who enjoy action-packed shooter games and mission-based challenges.
